name: Party Jollof Rice
intro: Bring to a boil then cover and simmer on low heat for 25-30 minutes, until the rice is soft and has absorbed most of the liquid. Stir the rice gently, take oﬀ the heat and leave to stand for 5 minutes.

ingredients.item: long-grain rice or “sella” golden basmati rice
red bell pepper (deseeded and roughly chopped)

method: Place the tomatoes, red bell pepper, chilli, garlic and ginger in a blender with 1 cup of water and blend until smooth.

Heat the sunflower oil in a large saucepan or cooking pot. Add the onions and sauté for 2-3 minutes. Add the blended pepper and tomato mixture. Cook on high heat for 5 minutes. Add the washed rice, 1/2 cup of water, tomato paste, curry powder, thyme, bay leaf, stock cube, liquid smoke (optional) and salt to taste. Stir well to combine all the ingredients.

Bring to a boil then cover and simmer on low heat for 25-30 minutes, until the rice is soft and has absorbed most of the liquid. Stir the rice gently, take oﬀ the heat and leave to stand for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with a side of your choice such as Moin Moin (page 156), coleslaw (page 138), fried plantain and/or mixed vegetables.
